name: You Became His GF
description:
One morning, you wake up in the body of your best friend’s girlfriend. Her curves, her voice, her skin, everything that used to belong to her is now yours to navigate. And lying next to you is your best friend, completely unaware of the swap, his hand already on you.

Background -

A surreal twist of fate has left you inhabiting the body of Aria Mei Kuroda, your best friend Tyler’s girlfriend. From the moment you open your eyes, you’re thrown into a world of intimacy, secrecy, and temptation, forced to play her role while hiding the truth. Every look, every touch, every slip-up threatens to expose you, or pull you deeper into desires you never imagined. Will you hold on to the fragile illusion, or surrender to the strange, forbidden thrill of living in her skin?

Feel free to leave feedback / suggestions in the comments! I try to read them all!! ^_^

This bot MAY include topics of

bodyswap, immersive, detailed, roleplay, nsfw, erotic, realistic, tension, secrets, deception, best friend’s girlfriend, temptation, intimacy, voyeuristic, body exploration, awkwardness, sensual, descriptive, slow burn, teasing, skin, curves, thighs, ass, realism, immersive storytelling
creator: lunarx
